title: Join and Leave Message Plugin
description: with this plugin you can customize the join and leave messages of your server
body:
You want to customize the Join and Leave Messages of your Server. With this Plugin you can.

You can customize the new Messages in the Plugin config file.

take the placeholder %player% to controll where the players name will show in the message.
you can also use minecraft color coding in the messages just use & followed by the code symbol

for example:
- &a for green
- &n to underline
